_meta.description: Registry of public contracts (interfaces, types, HTTP endpoints, signal events) exposed by each Node. Derived from relationships.json exposes.contracts but expanded with kind, package, and status. Use this before writing code that crosses a Node boundary to find the exact interface to depend on.

interfaces.name: IGridContext
interfaces.description: Distributed context with correlation, causation, and baggage. Present in every scoped operation.

interfaces.name: IGridContextAccessor
interfaces.description: Ambient accessor for IGridContext — resolves the current context from the call chain.

interfaces.name: INodeContext
interfaces.description: Static node-scoped metadata singleton — NodeId, NodeName, environment.

interfaces.name: IOperationContext
interfaces.description: Scoped per logical operation. Created at entry points (HTTP, message, job).

interfaces.name: IOperationContextAccessor
interfaces.description: Ambient accessor for IOperationContext.

interfaces.name: IStartupHook
interfaces.description: Lifecycle extension point — runs during Node startup before serving traffic.

interfaces.name: IShutdownHook
interfaces.description: Lifecycle extension point — runs during graceful shutdown.

interfaces.name: INodeLifecycle
interfaces.description: Aggregated lifecycle coordinator — manages startup and shutdown hooks.

interfaces.name: IHealthContributor
interfaces.description: Plugs into the health aggregation pipeline (/health endpoint).

interfaces.name: IReadinessContributor
interfaces.description: Plugs into the readiness aggregation pipeline (/ready endpoint).

interfaces.name: ITraceEnricher
interfaces.description: Adds custom tags/attributes to OpenTelemetry spans.

interfaces.name: ILogScopeFactory
interfaces.description: Creates structured log scopes enriched with GridContext.

interfaces.name: ITenantRateLimitPolicy
interfaces.description: Evaluates replaceable per-tenant rate-limit decisions. Kernel supplies a no-op default; product Nodes own policy.

interfaces.name: IBillingEventEmitter
interfaces.description: Emits normalized tenant billing events. Kernel supplies a no-op default; product Nodes own commercial integration.

interfaces.name: BillingEvent
interfaces.description: Normalized tenant billing event envelope for commercial Nodes.

interfaces.name: TenantRateLimitDecision
interfaces.description: Result of tenant rate-limit evaluation.

interfaces.name: TenantRateLimitOutcome
interfaces.description: Allow, Throttle, or Reject outcome enum for tenant rate-limit evaluation.

interfaces.name: ITelemetryActivityFactory
interfaces.description: Creates Activity instances for trace spans, pre-enriched with GridContext.

interfaces.name: IAgentExecutionContext
interfaces.description: LLM agent execution context — extends IOperationContext with agent identity and scope.

interfaces.name: CorrelationId
interfaces.description: ULID-based strongly-typed correlation ID. Never null in a live GridContext.

interfaces.name: NodeId
interfaces.description: ULID-based strongly-typed Node identity.

interfaces.name: TenantId
interfaces.description: ULID-based strongly-typed tenant identity with `TenantId.Internal` sentinel and `IsInternal` predicate for Grid-internal operations.

interfaces.name: ProjectId
interfaces.description: ULID-based strongly-typed project identity.

interfaces.name: RunId
interfaces.description: ULID-based strongly-typed run identity.

interfaces.name: StudioId
interfaces.description: ULID-based strongly-typed studio identity.

interfaces.name: ITransportPublisher
interfaces.description: Publish messages to a broker. Transport-agnostic.

interfaces.name: ITransportConsumer
interfaces.description: Consume messages from a broker. Transport-agnostic.

interfaces.name: IMessageHandler<T>
interfaces.description: Implement to handle a specific message type. Registered via DI.

interfaces.name: ITransportEnvelope
interfaces.description: Wraps a message with routing metadata, GridContext, and retry state.

interfaces.name: ISecretStore
interfaces.description: Read secrets by name. Always resolves latest version — no pinning (invariant 21).

interfaces.name: IConfigProvider
interfaces.description: Read typed configuration values from the shared App Configuration store.

interfaces.name: IVaultClient
interfaces.description: Low-level Vault client. Prefer ISecretStore for application code.

interfaces.name: ISecretProvider
interfaces.description: Provider slot interface — implement to add a new secret backend (Azure KV, AWS, File, InMemory).

interfaces.name: IConfigSource
interfaces.description: Provider slot interface — implement to add a new configuration source.

interfaces.name: TenantScopedSecretResolver
interfaces.description: ADR-0026 tenant-aware resolver layered over ISecretStore. Resolves `tenant-{tenantId}-{secretName}` first for external tenants and falls back to the standard node path; internal tenants use the standard path directly.

interfaces.name: IRotator
interfaces.description: Implement per secret type to define rotation logic. Called by the rotation Azure Function.

interfaces.name: RotationResult
interfaces.description: Outcome of a rotation attempt — new secret value, version, and audit metadata.

interfaces.name: IAuthenticatedIdentityAccessor
interfaces.description: Resolves the authenticated identity from the current GridContext/IOperationContext.

interfaces.name: IAuthorizationPolicy
interfaces.description: Define authorization requirements. Auth validates JWT tokens against policies.

interfaces.name: AuthenticationResult
interfaces.description: Result of JWT validation — success/failure, claims, identity.

interfaces.name: AuthorizationDecision
interfaces.description: Result of a policy evaluation — allow/deny, reason.

interfaces.name: ApiResult<T>
interfaces.description: Standard success response envelope — data, metadata, correlation ID.

interfaces.name: ApiResult
interfaces.description: Non-generic variant for void responses.

interfaces.name: ApiErrorResponse
interfaces.description: Standard error envelope — error code, message, correlation ID. Mapped from exceptions.

interfaces.name: IRepository<T>
interfaces.description: Generic repository pattern — CRUD over a tenant-aware data store.

interfaces.name: IUnitOfWork
interfaces.description: Coordinates transactions across repositories. Commit, rollback, scoped lifetime.

interfaces.name: IOutboxStore
interfaces.description: Transactional outbox — stores messages within a database transaction for exactly-once delivery via Transport.

interfaces.name: IAuditLog
interfaces.description: Append-only write of an AuditEntry. No update method. No delete method. Append-only is enforced at the interface surface, not only at storage (ADR-0030 D4). Relocated and generalized Grid-wide from HoneyDrunk.Operator.Abstractions per ADR-0030 D5.

interfaces.name: IAuditQuery
interfaces.description: Time-ordered and filtered read/forensic retrieval over the durable audit record. Net-new contract introduced by ADR-0030 D3; has no Operator precedent. Satisfies ADR-0018 D9's 'work off the read surface, not by mutating entries' commitment.

interfaces.name: AuditEntry
interfaces.description: Record. Canonical append-only audit record — actor, action, context, outcome, correlation id, tenant. Generalized Grid-wide from the Operator-scoped shape. Drops the I prefix per the Grid-wide naming rule (records drop I, interfaces keep it). Relocated from HoneyDrunk.Operator.Abstractions per ADR-0030 D5.

interfaces.name: ITraceSink
interfaces.description: Receive trace spans from the OTLP collector. Implement to add a new telemetry backend.

interfaces.name: ILogSink
interfaces.description: Receive structured log entries.

interfaces.name: IMetricsSink
interfaces.description: Receive metric data points.

interfaces.name: TelemetryTagKeys.HoneyDrunk.TenantId
interfaces.description: Standard `tenant_id` telemetry tag key. Low-cardinality only; bounded by Notify Cloud cardinality criteria.

interfaces.name: IObservationTarget
interfaces.description: Declares an external system to observe, including identity, connector selection, and credential handle.

interfaces.name: IObservationConnector
interfaces.description: Provider-slot interface. Connector implementations intake external events and translate them to normalized observation events.

interfaces.name: IObservationEvent
interfaces.description: Canonical observation event shape that crosses the Observe boundary regardless of source connector.

interfaces.name: INotificationSender
interfaces.description: Send a channel-agnostic notification through Notify intake and delivery mechanics. Decision-layer policy belongs in Communications.

interfaces.name: INotificationGateway
interfaces.description: Delivery gateway slot used by Notify runtime/provider implementations; it enqueues/dispatches structurally valid notifications and does not evaluate recipient preference/cadence policy.

interfaces.name: ICommunicationOrchestrator
interfaces.description: Top-level entry point for evaluating and sending outbound communication intents. Decides send/suppress/schedule outcomes and delegates approved delivery to Notify.

interfaces.name: IMessageIntent
interfaces.description: Business-event message intent boundary: stable intent kind, trigger event id, recipient, and payload.

interfaces.name: MessageIntent
interfaces.description: Immutable value-shaped implementation of IMessageIntent for simple communication flows.

interfaces.name: IRecipientResolver
interfaces.description: Resolves one or more recipients targeted by a communication intent.

interfaces.name: IPreferenceStore
interfaces.description: Tenant-scoped recipient communication preferences: opt-out, suppressed intent kinds, quiet hours, and channel preference.

interfaces.name: ICadencePolicy
interfaces.description: Tenant-scoped cadence policy that returns allow, suppress, or defer verdicts for recipient/intent tuples.

interfaces.name: ICommunicationDecisionLog
interfaces.description: Append-only audit sink for every Communications send-or-suppress decision.

interfaces.name: CommunicationDecisionLogEntry
interfaces.description: Audit record containing decision id, timestamp, tenant, intent kind, recipient, message decision, and correlation id.

interfaces.name: MessageDecision
interfaces.description: Result of evaluating or sending a communication intent: outcome, reason, optional scheduled time, and optional correlation key.

interfaces.name: MessageDecisionOutcome
interfaces.description: Allowed, Sent, SuppressedByPreference, SuppressedByCadence, Scheduled, or Failed.

interfaces.name: RecipientHandle
interfaces.description: Recipient identity plus preferred channel hint.

interfaces.name: RecipientPreferences
interfaces.description: Tenant-scoped preference snapshot for a recipient.

interfaces.name: CadenceVerdict
interfaces.description: Cadence policy result: outcome, optional defer time, and audit-friendly reason.

interfaces.name: CadenceOutcome
interfaces.description: Cadence verdict outcome enum: Allow, Suppress, or Defer.

interfaces.name: IChatClient
interfaces.description: Canonical chat completion entry point. Shape-compatible with Microsoft.Extensions.AI but a distinct type under HoneyDrunk.AI.Abstractions (ADR-0016 D6).

interfaces.name: IEmbeddingGenerator
interfaces.description: Canonical embedding entry point. Shape-compatible with Microsoft.Extensions.AI but a distinct type under HoneyDrunk.AI.Abstractions (ADR-0016 D6).

interfaces.name: IModelProvider
interfaces.description: Provider-slot interface — implement per inference backend (OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure OpenAI, InMemory).

interfaces.name: IModelRouter
interfaces.description: Capability-driven model selection. Routes inference requests to the most appropriate provider based on policy, capability, cost, and runtime constraints.

interfaces.name: IRoutingPolicy
interfaces.description: Pluggable routing strategy — cost-first, capability-first, latency-first, compliance-first. Sourced from Azure App Configuration via Vault's IConfigProvider.

interfaces.name: ModelCapabilityDeclaration
interfaces.description: Record. Machine-readable model capability metadata used by IModelRouter to match requests to supported providers.

interfaces.name: ICostLedger
interfaces.description: Per-call token and cost accounting surface. Cost-rate tables sourced from Azure App Configuration via Vault's IConfigProvider — never hardcoded.

interfaces.name: IAgent
interfaces.description: Core agent interface — identity, capability declarations, execution entry point.

interfaces.name: IAgentExecutionContext
interfaces.description: Agents-owned execution context extending Kernel's IAgentExecutionContext with AI-specific bindings (memory refs, tool bindings).

interfaces.name: IAgentLifecycle
interfaces.description: Lifecycle hooks for agents: register → initialize → execute → complete → decommission.

interfaces.name: IToolInvoker
interfaces.description: How agents call tools — resolves through Capabilities' tool registry.

interfaces.name: IAgentMemory
interfaces.description: Memory read/write from the agent's perspective — backed by Memory Node storage.

interfaces.name: IMemoryStore
interfaces.description: Write, read, search, delete agent memories. Scoped by TenantId/ProjectId/AgentId.

interfaces.name: IMemoryScope
interfaces.description: Scoped memory access — an agent only sees its authorized memories through this interface.

interfaces.name: IMemorySummarizer
interfaces.description: Compress memories beyond a token threshold. Delegates embedding to AI Node.

interfaces.name: IKnowledgeStore
interfaces.description: Ingest, query, and delete knowledge sources.

interfaces.name: IDocumentIngester
interfaces.description: Parse and chunk documents into retrievable units, generate embeddings via AI.

interfaces.name: IRetrievalPipeline
interfaces.description: Query → ranked results with source attribution. Used for RAG workflows.

interfaces.name: IKnowledgeSource
interfaces.description: Metadata about an ingested source — origin URL, version, last updated timestamp.

interfaces.name: IEvalRunner
interfaces.description: Run a prompt evaluation set and return scored results.

interfaces.name: IEvalScorer
interfaces.description: Score an inference result against expected criteria.

interfaces.name: IEvalSuite
interfaces.description: A named collection of evaluation cases with expected outputs and scoring criteria.

interfaces.name: ICapabilityRegistry
interfaces.description: Discover and resolve available tools by name and version.

interfaces.name: ICapability
interfaces.description: A registered tool — schema, version, executor, permission requirements.

interfaces.name: ICapabilityPermission
interfaces.description: Authorization gate for a capability — checked before execution.

interfaces.name: IWorkflow
interfaces.description: A named multi-step pipeline — steps, inputs, outputs, compensation logic.

interfaces.name: IWorkflowEngine
interfaces.description: Execute, resume, and compensate workflows.

interfaces.name: IWorkflowStep
interfaces.description: A single unit of work within a workflow — execute, compensate, retry policy.

interfaces.name: IApprovalGate
interfaces.description: Require human approval before an agent action proceeds.

interfaces.name: ICircuitBreaker
interfaces.description: Halt agent or workflow execution when safety thresholds are breached.

interfaces.name: ICostController
interfaces.description: Enforce per-agent and per-tenant inference cost limits.

interfaces.name: IAuditLog
interfaces.description: RELOCATED to honeydrunk-audit (HoneyDrunk.Audit.Abstractions) and generalized Grid-wide per ADR-0030 D5. Operator no longer owns this contract — it is reclassified from owner to consumer/emitter and emits AuditEntry against the IAuditLog it now consumes from HoneyDrunk.Audit.Abstractions. See ADR-0030 and ADR-0018's additive amendment note.

interfaces.name: ISimulator
interfaces.description: Run a simulated execution of a plan or workflow and return risk analysis.

interfaces.name: ISimulationResult
interfaces.description: Outcome of a simulation — steps executed, risks identified, confidence score.

interfaces.name: job-deploy-bicep.yml
interfaces.description: Reusable deploy workflow: az deployment {group|sub} create on a Bicep template from HoneyDrunk.Infrastructure (nodes/{node}/ or platform/) with the env bicepparam, per ADR-0077 D4 (amended). OIDC; what-if preflight; local-path module resolution — no registry. Consumed by HoneyDrunk.Infrastructure deploy workflows.

interfaces.name: job-bicep-lint.yml
interfaces.description: Reusable bicep lint + build-params PR gate per ADR-0077 D3. Fails on error-severity findings against the consuming repo's bicepconfig.json. Consumed by HoneyDrunk.Infrastructure's pr.yml.

interfaces.name: job-node-workspace.yml
interfaces.description: Reusable Node.js workspace validation workflow for TypeScript/JavaScript repos. Installs dependencies, then runs configurable build, test, and lint commands.

interfaces.name: job-rust-workspace.yml
interfaces.description: Reusable Rust workspace validation workflow. Installs a validated Rust toolchain, then runs configurable cargo fmt, build, test, and clippy commands.

interfaces.name: job-node-dependency-report.yml
interfaces.description: Reusable Node.js dependency report workflow. Installs dependencies, runs a configurable outdated-dependency command, and uploads the JSON report artifact.

interfaces.name: job-rust-dependency-report.yml
interfaces.description: Reusable Rust dependency report workflow. Generates Cargo metadata and tree reports for Cargo workspaces and uploads report artifacts.

interfaces.name: job-node-security-audit.yml
interfaces.description: Reusable Node.js security audit workflow. Installs dependencies, runs a configurable npm audit command, and uploads the JSON audit artifact.

interfaces.name: job-rust-security-audit.yml
interfaces.description: Reusable Rust security audit workflow. Installs cargo-audit, runs cargo audit, and uploads the JSON audit artifact.

interfaces.name: modules/
interfaces.description: Per-concern reusable Bicep modules (networking, compute, identity, data, secrets, messaging, observability), consumed by LOCAL RELATIVE PATH.

interfaces.name: platform/
interfaces.description: Shared-foundation templates (shared Container Apps Environment, image ACR, Log Analytics, Service Bus); exports resource IDs.

interfaces.name: nodes/
interfaces.description: Per-Node leaf templates (main.bicep + parameters.{env}.bicepparam).
